PluginData.Author: OwendB
PluginData.Description:
GridBackups is a Magnetar server plugin that exports ship and station grid blueprints on configurable triggers — interval, steady-state, change thresholds, and pre-concealment — and stores them in a shared Quasar data folder so backups aren't tied to a single managed Magnetar host.
Supports connected-grid grouping, owner-named folders, NPC/nobody filtering, retention limits, the !gridbackup chat commands, and an external API for other plugins to request backups directly.
Functionality is inspired by and reimplements the original Torch plugin GridBackup by LordTylus (license: Apache-2.0): https://github.com/LordTylus/SE-Torch-Plugin-ALE-GridBackup
